parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3:8b', prompt: 'You are a B2B lead scoring expert. Analyze this lead and provide a score from 1-100 and enrichment data.

Lead info:
Name: ' + ($json.body.name || 'Unknown') + '
Email: ' + ($json.body.email || 'Unknown') + '
Company: ' + ($json.body.company || 'Unknown') + '
Job Title: ' + ($json.body.job_title || 'Unknown') + '
Message: ' + ($json.body.message || 'None') + '
Source: ' + ($json.body.source || 'Unknown') + '

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "score": 75,
  "tier": "HOT|WARM|COLD",
  "reasoning": "Brief explanation of score",
  "company_size_estimate": "startup|smb|mid-market|enterprise",
  "likely_use_case": "What they probably need",
  "suggested_action": "What to do next",
  "urgency": "high|medium|low",
  "personalized_opener": "Suggested first line for outreach email"
}', stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.3, num_predict: 500 } }) }}
